author: exoascension
description: A ChatGPT bot trained on your vault notes. Ask your AI questions about your own thoughts and ideas!

name: Vault Chat

releases.author: cpaika
releases.description:
Note Chat - Chat with ChatGPT about your current note.  Ask questions, ask chatgpt to critique your notes, or what it's missing.
Exclusions - you can now exclude paths from being indexed by ChatGPT for content you would prefer to keep private.
Bug Fixes - improved performance for large vaults, UI tweaks

## What's Changed
* Implement note chat by @kristenbrann in https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/pull/28
* Improvements: debounce save, auto focus input, remove redundant blocks by @kristenbrann in https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/pull/30
* Adding path based file exclusions  by @cpaika in https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/pull/29


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0
releases.name: 1.3.0: Note Chat, File Exclusions, Improvements

releases.author: kristenbrann
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: cpaika
releases.description:
Added Semantic Search (Command Palette: "Semantic Search") along with improving the accuracy of your Vault model.


## What's Changed
* Adds hyde prompts for Ask ChatGPT command by @kristenbrann in https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/pull/23
* Enforce 30s timeout on OpenAI calls by @kristenbrann in https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/pull/24

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/compare/1.1.0...1.2.0
releases.name: 1.2.0 - Semantic Search & Better Results

releases.author: kristenbrann
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Block vectors by @kristenbrann in https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/pull/19

Improved indexing of notes and behind-the-scenes ChatGPT prompts will bring you significantly better results when chatting with the Ask ChatGPT command. Increased resilience when communicating with the OpenAI API with the addition of throttling and retries. Indexing is now much faster, and can index a 600 file vault in about 2 minutes with the addition of batching.


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/exoascension/vault-chat/compare/1.0.6...1.1.0
